title: salvia linnaei subsp. clandestina
intro: Salvia linnaei subsp. clandestina, also known as the hidden sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia linnaei plant, a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Salvia linnaei subsp. clandestina include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help to regulate blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
